ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., New, Feedback Requested) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., Minor, Major, Critical) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level assigned to the issue (e.g., High, Urgent) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the issue (e.g., Bug report, Feature request) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the issue (if any) */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "reported_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was initially reported */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was last updated */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies or comments on the issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the issue */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time it took to resolve the issue */,
  "resolution_version" TEXT /* Version number of the software where the issue is resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team name that the user belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA, project manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Project start date */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Project end date */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue related to the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the status represents a resolved state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code to visually represent the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code to visually represent the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon to visually represent the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path for the uploaded attachment */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to receive the notification */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue that triggered the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., issue updated, comment added) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_dependencies" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "dependent_issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue that this issue depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "dependent_issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tags" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_versions" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "version_number")
)
